title: Alumni Dinner | MBA IB DSE
headings: A GLIMSE OF PAST GLORIOUS EVENINGS
paragraphs: The Annual Alumni Dinner, is the flagship event of MBA-IB, Department of Commerce, Delhi School of Economics. Conducted annually, it bridges the gap between alumni and their alma mater in terms of knowledge transfer, opportunity harbinger and a model to reconnect with friends and colleagues.

We cordially extend an invitation for you to join a night of celebration in your honor. To rekindle with your mates, seniors, juniors, faculty and those who added value outside the classroom learning. We, the students, are waiting for you to lighten up the evening and have the best time.
If you wish to entertain the company at the event, please fill in the form via the link tab below.

Dear Alums following the sage words - knowledge increases by sharing - We , Team Alumni Relations Committee has commenced the " Alumni Mentorship Program" to provide a platform for the direct learning and sharing of knowledge from our dignified alums to the current batches of DSE. We request the interested alumni to kindly fill the form for the mentorship program through the mentioned link.
The Annual Alumni Dinner on 28th October 2023 at Taj Vivanta, Dwarka, Delhi.
Address: Service Rd, Sector 21, Dwarka, New Delhi, Delhi, 110075

Dear Alumni, We have created a whatsapp group for the Annual Alumni Dinner - Reminiscence'23 where you will get all the updates regarding the event. We request you to kindly join this group for the easier flow of information from the team to our esteemed alums.

Student BodyPublic Relations CommitteeCorporate Relations TeamAlumni Relations CommitteeTeam ConventionIISACDiscipline CommitteeConstrat CellMarcom CellFinance CellInternational Business CellSports ClubTraining and Development ClubInfinty Club
Student CornerPR Coverage FormTime Table | Batch of 2023-24Programme BrochureNewsletters
Chhatra Marg, Delhi School Of Economics, University Enclave, Delhi-110007
For any complaints against any constituent member of the MBA IB Student Body, Kindly reach out to PRESIDENT@MIBDU.ORG
